name: Improved Pact Weapon
entries: You can use any weapon you summon with your Pact of the Blade feature as a spellcasting focus for your warlock spells.
In addition, the weapon gains a +1 bonus to its attack and damage rolls, unless it is a magic weapon that already has a bonus to those rolls.
Finally, the weapon you conjure can be a {@item shortbow|phb}, {@item longbow|phb}, {@item light crossbow|phb}, or {@item heavy crossbow|phb}.
